sentences.arabic: كَانَ الرَّجُلُ يَتَجَوَّلُ فِي سُوقِ الْكُتُبِ الْقَدِيمَةِ حِينَ لَفَتَ انْتِبَاهَهُ كِتَابٌ صَغِيرٌ.
sentences.translation: Muškarac je šetao tržnicom starih knjiga kada mu je jedna mala knjiga privukla pažnju.
sentences.translationEn: The man was strolling through the old book market when a small book caught his eye.

sentences.arabic: أَخَذَهُ بِيَدِهِ وَقَرَأَ عُنْوَانَهُ الَّذِي كَانَ مَكْتُوبًا بِخَطٍّ جَمِيلٍ.
sentences.translation: Uzeo je u ruke i pročitao naslov ispisan lijepim rukopisom.
sentences.translationEn: He picked it up and read the title, which was written in beautiful script.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ الْكِتَابُ قَدِيمًا، وَصَفَحَاتُهُ صَفْرَاءُ مِنَ الزَّمَنِ.
sentences.translation: Knjiga je bila stara, a stranice su joj požutjele od vremena.
sentences.translationEn: The book was old, its pages yellowed with time.

sentences.arabic: فَتَحَ الصَّفْحَةَ الأُولَى فَوَجَدَ قِصِيدَةً رَائِعَةً لَمْ يَقْرَأْهَا مِنْ قَبْلُ.
sentences.translation: Otvorio je prvu stranicu i pronašao predivnu pjesmu koju nikad ranije nije čitao.
sentences.translationEn: He opened the first page and found a wonderful poem he had never read before.

sentences.arabic: دَفَعَ ثَمَنَهُ بِسُرُورٍ وَمَشَى إِلَى الْبَيْتِ وَهُوَ يَحْمِلُ كَنْزًا صَغِيرًا.
sentences.translation: Radosno je platio i otišao kući noseći mali dragulj.
sentences.translationEn: He paid happily and walked home carrying a little treasure.
